executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex from thread Task
Add a new AGREE annex to thread implementation Task.impl_1
In the new annex, reference the properties through the component instance 'Task1' (which is the subcomponent of node_a.impl)
Replace each property reference with the correct qualified path: Task1.Dispatch_Protocol, Task1.Period, Task1.Compute_Execution_time, Task1.Priority
